arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Bayern Munich vs. PSG
arts.sum: The lineups for Tuesday's Champions League clash between Bayern Munich and Paris Saint-Germain have been announced.

arts.ttl: Sporting v Arsenal, Bayern Munich v PSG, and more: Champions League – live
arts.sum: Champions League updates, fifth round of games Live scoreboard | Man City v Feyenoord | Email Niall A notable name on the Atlético scoresheet: Júlian Álvarez, who left Manchester City in the summer but has had a slow start to life in Madrid. He’s certainly been missed by Pep Guardiola’s side, who are bidding to end a run of five (!) straight defeats at home to Feyenoord: It’s half-time in the 5.45pm (GMT) kick-offs, taking place in Czechia and Slovakia. Atlético Madrid lead Sparta Prague 2-0, while Slovan Bratislava are holding Milan to a 1-1 draw. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich lauds Eric Dier for “team first” mentality
arts.sum: “When I see how Eric Dier trains every day - he’s one of the best teammates I’ve ever had,” said Joshua Kimmich (via @iMiaSanMia ). With each and every player contributing on game days or at the practice facility, Bayern is better prepared for the lengthy season than last year.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs PSG: Live stream, game time thread, how to watch
arts.sum: While you’re waiting for the game, why not check out our Marcus Iredahl’s Bundesliga Rundown podcast? Also, we’re from all parts of the world so don’t feel shy if you’re from a country that doesn’t seem represented on the blog.

arts.ttl: 'Super talent': Danny Murphy says youngster Tottenham are eyeing for January could be the next Harry Kane
arts.sum: He's been tipped as the next Kane! 🤩

arts.ttl: Man Utd identify second transfer alternative to 'difficult' Alphonso Davies deal
arts.sum: A new left wing-back could be a priority for Manchester United's new head coach Ruben Amorim, but the club face a battle for one of the players best-suited to the task

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Alphonso Davies on Manchester United’s radar
arts.sum: According to Florian Plettenberg, Manchester United have identified Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies as a potential transfer target. As stated in the report, the Red Devils are looking to bolster…

arts.ttl: Imagine the Nike Total 90 PSG 25 26 Third Kit
arts.sum: Based on leaked colors and information that Nike will be bringing back the T90 design on the 25-26 third kit, shirt designer COLEIRA (@coleirafc) imagined the PSG 25-26 third kit to see how it would look.

arts.ttl: PSG out to continue ‘winning’ run in European competition
arts.sum: Games between Bayern and PSG always attract the eyes of the world and rarely disappoint. Bayern have won the last three meetings between the two but boss Vincent Kompany is not underestimating the Ligue 1 side ahead of Tuesday’s game.
